description: Style NoteA brand known for its unpredictable and unique styling baggit continues to awe us with their attractive designs for purses. Available to you in a variety of designs and colours at prices that do not burn a hole in your pocket, these pouches  are a must buy. So go ahead. Indulge.Product DetailsOlive and purple bag with printed checks and pleats in frontOne main zippered compartment Synthetic lining with two zippered pocketsZippered pocket at back Two short  handles with ring detail for carrying easeMaterials and CareSyntheticWipe with damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 18 cmWidth: 31 cmDepth: 15 cm
